ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position or step in the simulation */,
  "effective_radiation_temperature" REAL /* Effective radiation temperature */,
  "epsilon_effective" REAL /* Epsilon effective */,
  "spectral_radiance" REAL /* Spectral radiance */,
  "flowgofluxradiationheat" REAL /* Flow of flux radiation heat */,
  "flowgofluxconductionheat" REAL /* Flow of flux conduction heat */,
  "characteristic_surface_temperature" REAL /* Characteristic surface temperature */,
  "flowgofluxforcedconvectionheat" REAL /* Flow of flux forced convection heat */,
  "flowgofluxviscousheating" REAL /* Flow of flux viscous heating */,
  "heat_budget" REAL /* Heat budget */,
  "channel_width" INTEGER /* Channel width */,
  "crystal_fraction" REAL /* Crystal fraction */,
  "core_temperature" REAL /* Core temperature */,
  "viscosity" REAL /* Viscosity */,
  "yield_strength" REAL /* Yield strength */,
  "density" REAL /* Density */,
  "mean_velocity" REAL /* Mean velocity */,
  "crust_temperature" REAL /* Crust temperature */,
  "effective_cover_fraction" REAL /* Effective cover fraction */,
  "dphi_dx" REAL /* Dphi_dx */,
  "dtemp_dx" REAL /* Dtemp_dx */,
  "dphi_dtemp" REAL /* Dphi_dtemp */,
  "current_time" REAL /* Current time */,
  "dtemp_dt" REAL /* Dtemp_dt */,
  "slope" REAL /* Slope */,
  "effusion_rate" REAL /* Effusion rate */,
  "channel_depth" REAL /* Channel depth */,
  "tho_0" REAL /* Tho_0 */,
  "tho_b" REAL /* Tho_b */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, error) */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who ran the simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Unique name for the simulation run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation purpose or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation run */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter value */,
  "parameter_group" TEXT /* Group of the parameter (e.g., thermal, fluid dynamics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the researcher's profile picture */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation run */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor deployment */,
  "data_collection_start" TEXT /* Start date of data collection */,
  "data_collection_end" TEXT /* End date of data collection */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the sensor */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Calibration status of the sensor (e.g., calibrated, needs calibration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remote_sensing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remote sensing data set */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation run */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the remote sensing data */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of remote sensing data */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the data was acquired */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the remote sensing data */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used for remote sensing */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the remote sensing data */,
  "data_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the data */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remote_sensing_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation run */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., temperature profile, heat flow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the result data */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., processed, pending) */,
  "result_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the result */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., graph, map) */,
  "visualization_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each simulation run
